manage.apply.title: Thumela Umcimbi Wakho
manage.apply.subtitle: Faka isicelo sokuthola ukufinyelela komleli ukuze ushicilele imicimbi yakho yokudansa ku-DanceResource.
manage.apply.submittedMessage: Sizobheka isicelo sakho bese siphendula maduze.
manage.apply.labelDescription: Sitshele ngemicimbi yakho noma inhlangano yakho
manage.apply.labelHost: Ingabe igama lakho noma inhlangano yakho isivele ifakiwe enkundleni yethu?
manage.apply.labelProofUrl: Isixhumanisi sewebhusayithi yakho noma izinkundla zokuxhumana (okokhetho)
manage.apply.loginRequiredMessage: Ukuze ufake isicelo sokuba umhleli futhi ushicilele imicimbi yakho yokudansa, kufanele ungene ngemvume noma wakhe i-akhawunti kuqala. Ngemva kokungena, uzobuyiselwa lapha.
manage.auth.editorMessage: Udinga indima yomleli ukuze ufinyelele indawo yokuphatha.
manage.auth.adminMessage: Lesi sigaba sitholakala kuphela kubalawuli benkundla.
manage.onboarding.welcomeMessage: Qala ngokwenza iphrofayela yomsingathi — lokhu kumele wena noma inhlangano yakho njengomhleli wemicimbi. Uma usunomsingathi, ungenza imicimbi futhi uxhumanise. Umcimbi ngamunye udinga okungenani umsingathi oyedwa.
manage.onboarding.needHostMessage: Dala iphrofayili yomsingathi. Uma ixhunyiwe nemicimbi yakho, uzokwazi ukuyishicilela.
manage.onboarding.hostReadyMessage: Manje yenza umcimbi wakho wokuqala. Uzokwazi ukuhlela isheduli, indawo, futhi uxhumanise nephrofayela yakho yomsingathi ukuze ababambiqhaza bazi ukuthi ubani ohlela.
